title: Can i have a formula column change value of another column?
excerpt: I have a column name “Clients” that we work with. I have a formula that is a long list of if functions that converts the “clients” column into email addresses to best contact them. Is there a way to mirror the formula ca…

posts.author: ncurewitz (Nathan Curewitz)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a column name “Clients” that we work with. I have a formula that is a long list of if functions that converts the “clients” column into email addresses to best contact them. Is there a way to mirror the formula calculation to another column. Preferably the email type column to automatically send emails to that particular email address the formula spit out?

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @ncurewitz check out the general caster app: https://monday.com/marketplace/8

Hope that helps!

posts.author: ncurewitz (Nathan Curewitz)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks so much for the reply. This what i was looking for
